Let's think step-by-step. This page lists the prices of various Canon photo printers. I need to find the highest and lowest prices among these printers. The lowest price I can see is $2.56 (ID: 5598) for the "Canon PIXMA MG2120 Color Photo Printer with Scanner and Copier". The highest price is $649.99 (ID: 5583) for the "Canon PIXMA iP4920 Premium Inkjet Photo Printer (5287B002)". I think I have achieved the objective.
